zh.Spaxton, Somerset, England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特斯帕斯頓

zh.Spaxton, Bridgwater, Somerset, England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特斯帕斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella Fichett於1383年3月24日出生在英國薩默塞特斯帕斯頓時，她的父親Thomas Fichett39歲，母親Richarda Inkepenne34歲。她和Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1423年4月25日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特斯帕斯頓享年40歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特度斯東。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella Fichett于1383年3月24日出生在英国薩默塞特斯帕斯頓时，她的父亲Thomas Fichett39岁，母亲Richarda Inkepenne34岁。她和Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1423年4月25日在英国英格兰薩默塞特斯帕斯頓享年40岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特度斯東。

nameMeanings.name: Fichett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Fitchett  .
Possibly an Americanized form of German   Fickert  .

variants.name: Fitchett
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from Old French Fichet, Fichot, or (in northern France) Fiket, Fikot, diminutive forms of fiche or fike ‘pointed implement for fixing or transfixing something or someone’ (such as a spear?), used as a nickname and as a personal name. See Fitch .

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella Fichett was born on 24 March 1383, in Spaxton, Somerset, England, her father, Thomas Fichett, was 39 and her mother, Richarda Inkepenne, was 34. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr. She died on 25 April 1423, in Spaxton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40, and was buried in Durston, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella Fichett est née le 24 mars 1383, à Spaxton, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Fichett, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Richarda Inkepenne, avait 34 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr. Elle est décédée le 25 avril 1423, à Spaxton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterrée à Durston, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella Fichett am 24. März 1383 in Spaxton, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Fichett 39 und ihre Mutter Richarda Inkepenne 34. Sie hatte mit Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 25. April 1423 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Spaxton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Durston, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Fichett è nata il il 24 marzo 1383 nel Spaxton, Somerset, England, sua padre, Thomas Fichett, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Richarda Inkepenne, aveva 34 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr. Morì il 25 aprile 1423, nel Spaxton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolta a Durston, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella Fichettが1383年3月24日にイギリスソメルセトスプアクストンで生まれた時，父Thomas Fichettは39歳，母Richarda Inkepenneは34歳であった。彼女はSir Robert Hill of Shilston Srとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1423年4月25日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトスプアクストンで40歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトダルストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella Fichett(이)가 1383년 3월 24일 영국 서머세트 스파스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Fichett(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Richarda Inkepenne(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1423년 4월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 스파스턴에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 뒤르스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.24 March 1383–25 April 1423: 24 de março de 1383–25 de abril de 1423
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Fichett nasceu em 24 de março de 1383, em Spaxton, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Fichett, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Richarda Inkepenne, tinha 34 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr. Ela faleceu em 25 de abril de 1423, em Spaxton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 40 anos, e foi sepultada em Durston, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella Fichett родилась 24 марта 1383 г. в местности спакстон, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Fichett было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Richarda Inkepenne, 34. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr. Она умерла 25 апреля 1423 г. в местности спакстон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет и была похоронена в местности дурстон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.24 March 1383–25 April 1423: 24 de marzo de 1383–25 de abril de 1423
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabella Fichett nació el 24 de marzo de 1383, en Spaxton, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Fichett, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Richarda Inkepenne, tenía 34 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Sir Robert Hill of Shilston Sr. Murió el 25 de abril de 1423, en Spaxton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultada en Durston, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
